title: End Progression
description: Configurably restricts mob spawning until after the Ender Dragon has been defeated.
body:
This mod, designed as a utility for modpack creators, prevents certain mobs from spawning before the Ender Dragon has been defeated.
## Configuration
The mod can be configured by adding desired mobs to the tag `end_progression:entity_types/restrict_spawns`. As the tag is empty by default, **the mod does nothing without configuration**.
## Commands
Whether the mod enforces its restrictions (in a specific dimension) can be **modified and surveyed** using `/endprog set <value>` and `/endprog get` respectively.
